Special Rules

Things to Know

"Good decisions make memories.
Bad decisions make better stories."

☀️

Weather & Dress

Warm Chennai summer awaits!

Morning Muhurtham — light silk sarees & breathable traditional formals. Keep it classic & comfortable.

Evening Reception — glam it up! Dressy silks, jewels, your best look.

🌿

Create Memories

You're not posing for a passport size photograph.

Flex the Instagram model / influencer in you.

Tag us when you post!

💃

Dance & Song

Ask the DJ for your favourite song and vibe with us.

Prepare a (fake) emotional speech for the bride & groom.

Non-professionals are highly encouraged.

Confidence > Talent

🥭

Secret Code

If you suddenly feel hungry…

Walk to the counter and say:

"Shivaji vaila Jalebi."

If the timing is right… special snacks appear 😌

Kindly respond by 10th May 2026

RSVP

Your presence would mean the world to us.
Please let us know you're coming!

Thank you! We can't wait to celebrate with you.

— J. Preetha & M. Uthresh

Kindly RSVP by 10th May 2026
